_observed: 2026-06-12 base6 paired sweep. A graded slab whose getItem aspects carry NO graded signal at all (no Graded/Grade/Grading Company/Professional Grader, top-level condition not 'Graded') — only the TITLE says 'PSA 8'. detectGraded correctly read the aspects as raw, so it briefly verified for base6-66-tentacruel under ANY_RAW. The resolver prefilter's title-graded drop (reusing inferListingCondition's certified grade-token disambiguation) now skips apparent slabs before getItem when the target condition is raw. Identity gates untouched: aspect-tagged slabs were always caught; this only stops aspect-LESS slabs.
title: Pokemon PSA 8 Tentacruel #66 Legendary Collection 2002 English
